  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic rattling/clattering noise at idle",
    "Frequency of noise correlates with timing chain speed",
    "Indicates a failed timing chain tensioner, worn guides, or excessive chain stretch"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the engine immediately to prevent catastrophic valve-to-piston contact",
    "Perform a teardown of the timing cover to inspect the chain, tensioner, and guides",
    "Replace the timing chain kit, including tensioner, guides, and sprockets"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly pronounced, rapid metallic slapping/rattling sound characteristic of a loose timing chain striking the timing cover or worn-through guides. This indicates a failed tensioner or extreme chain stretch, posing an immediate risk of skipped timing and catastrophic engine failure.",

    "OEM Service Manual - Engine Mechanical (Timing Chain Diagnostics & Replacement)"
  ]
